title: Melaveh Malkah: The Meal That Escorts the Shabbat Queen
title_zh: 梅拉维·玛尔卡：送别安息日女王的晚餐
title_he: מלווה מלכה: הסעודה המלווה את מלכת השבת
author: Torah Light Editorial Team
target_audience: Mandarin-speaking learners with no prior Jewish knowledge
cultural_parallels: Chinese 送客 (sòng kè) - escorting guests tradition
Chinese 聚会 (jùhuì) - extending gatherings late into night
Japanese 二次会 (nijikai) - second party tradition
Middle Eastern extended tea service customs
key_concepts: Melaveh Malkah as the fourth Shabbat meal
Gradual transition from sacred to mundane time
Saturday night vulnerability in Jewish mysticism
practical_applications: Songs and melodies for Saturday night
